title: 105 Mathematics Fig. 2   Fig. 3
subject: Mathematics
objective: To represent a decimal number using a grid paper
materials:
3 cardboards, 3 white chart papers, ruler, pencil,
eraser, adhesive, three sketch pens of different
colours (say Blue, Green and Red).
procedure:
1.   Take 3 cardboards of convenient size and paste a white paper on each
one of them.
2.   Make three 10   ×   10 grids on them and label the corners of the grids
as A, B, C and D as shown in Fig. 1.
3.   Take one of the grids and shade 6 horizontal strips out of 10 strips by
using red sketch pen starting from the bottom as shown in Fig. 2.

discussion:
This property of rigidity of triangles is used in day to day life in the
construction of bridges, ropes, ladders, furniture etc.
106 Laboratory Manual – Elementary Stage
